statusLine.description: ECC statusline: model | task | $cost tools files duration | dir | context bar

_comments.setup: Replace <plugin-root> with your ECC installation path. For plugin installs, use the resolved path from CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT.
_comments.display: Shows model name, current task, session cost, tool count, files modified, session duration, directory, and context usage bar with color thresholds.
_comments.dependencies: Reads bridge file from ecc-metrics-bridge.js PostToolUse hook. Both must be installed for full metrics display.
_comments.usage: Copy the statusLine object to your ~/.claude/settings.json
